display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Odylith routing_handoff / context_packet
execution profile + density/readiness posture

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Feature scoring
ambiguity, blast radius, context breadth,
coordination, reversibility, mechanicalness,
write-scope clarity, latency, requested depth

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Measured Odylith control advisories
state + confidence + freshness/evidence strength
signal conflict + packetizer alignment
depth/delegation + parallelism + budget/retrieval/speed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Task-family + route confidence
mechanical patch, bounded bugfix,
bounded feature, analysis/review,
critical change, coordination heavy

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hard gates
coordination too high, unclear write scope,
critical write under-specified,
cross-surface ownership unclear,
multi-agent adjudication, evolving context

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Runtime-backed local guard
hold local when Odylith still wants narrowing,
route is not spawn-ready, merge burden stays too high,
architecture dossier says full_scan_recommended or low-confidence high-risk,
advisory evidence is stale / weak / conflicted,
or packetizer alignment drifts / packet yield turns wasteful

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Confidence backstop
promote low-confidence writes
onto stronger GPT-5.4 tiers

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Odylith execution alignment
runtime-backed priors bias profile/model/reasoning choice
when confidence + route readiness agree;
grounded high-risk architecture can earn strongest bounded lane

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Task-class policy matrix
default profile + minimum delegated floor
per task family

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
xhigh gate
critical-risk or max-accuracy feature slice

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Spawn one subagent
native spawn_agent_overrides
or richer spawn_overrides

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Spawn + close contract
agent_role alias + agent_type,
owner, goal, expected_output,
termination_expectation, closeout payload

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Idle timeout rule
waiting on instruction >= threshold
use close_agent_overrides
then resume/reroute fresh slice

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Outcome classification
accepted | blocked | ambiguous | artifact missing | quality weak | broader coordination

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
One-step escalation ladder
Spark M -> Spark H or 5.4 M
Spark H -> 5.4 H
5.4 M -> 5.4 H
5.4 H -> 5.4 X

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Return to main thread
when failure shows the slice should be tightened locally

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Return control to main thread after xhigh or refusal

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
record_outcome()
global + family-aware soft-bias tuning in .odylith
